name: Aurora Desk Lamp
tagline: Warm, dimmable light with a sculpted aluminium body.
description: The Aurora Desk Lamp pairs a precision-milled aluminium arm with a soft, fully dimmable LED panel. A weighted base keeps it planted, while the magnetic head rotates a full 270 degrees for the perfect angle on any task.
highlights: Stepless dimming from candlelight to daylight
Memory of your last brightness setting

name: Nimbus Lounge Chair
tagline: A cloud-soft shell on a hand-finished oak frame.
description: Nimbus wraps a high-resilience foam shell in boucle upholstery and sets it on a solid oak frame. Designed for long evenings, it cradles your back while staying light enough to move between rooms.

name: Monolith Bookshelf
tagline: Modular steel shelving that grows with your library.
description: Monolith is a powder-coated steel shelving system built around a single repeating module. Stack it, span it, or wall-mount it — the tool-free connectors let you reconfigure the whole thing in minutes.

name: Halo Pendant Light
tagline: A floating ring of warm light for any table.
description: The Halo Pendant suspends a continuous ring of diffused LEDs from a slim braided cord. It throws a soft, even glow that flatters food and faces alike — ideal above a dining table or kitchen island.

name: Morning Hut Ceramic Surahi Pitcher With 4 Matching Glasses
tagline: A handmade, hand-painted village morning in your hands.
description: Great mornings deserve great stories. The Morning Hut Ceramic Surahi Pitcher With 4 Matching Glasses is a one-of-a-kind handmade and hand-painted 5-piece set — one tall, elegant Surahi pitcher with lid and four matching glasses — alive with a charming village scene of colourful huts, birds and trees dotted with cheerful polka dots that make every pour feel like a warm morning tale. Crafted from clay by skilled Indian artists in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh — the ceramic heartland of India — each piece carries generations of craft in every stroke. Made by hand, painted by hand, finished by hand — so no two are ever exactly alike. Tall, cheerful, and weighted just right — perfect for water, juice, sharbat, or your favourite cold brew. Not just a pitcher set. A little village morning in your hands.
highlights: Handmade & hand-painted — no two are alike
Village scene of huts, birds, trees & polka dots
Tall surahi with lid + 4 matching glasses
Perfect for water, juice, sharbat or cold brew

story.title: A little village morning
story.body: Colourful huts, birds and trees dotted with cheerful polka dots — every pour feels like a warm morning tale.

story.title: Made by hand in Khurja
story.body: Shaped from clay by skilled artists in Khurja, Uttar Pradesh — the ceramic heartland of India — carrying generations of craft in every stroke.

story.title: One pitcher, four glasses
story.body: A tall, elegant surahi with lid and four matching glasses. Weighted just right for water, juice, sharbat or your favourite cold brew.

seo.title: Morning Hut Hand-Painted Khurja Surahi Pitcher Set (4 Glasses)
seo.description: A handmade, hand-painted 5-piece Khurja ceramic set — tall surahi pitcher with lid + 4 matching glasses, alive with a colourful village scene. Crafted in Khurja, India.
